# TheURLShortner — Full Reference

> TheURLShortner (https://theurlshortner.com) is a free URL shortener with click tracking
> and no signup required. It turns long web addresses into short, shareable links, with
> optional custom back-half codes, password protection, expiration, QR codes, and a free
> public REST API.

## Overview
TheURLShortner is a free URL shortener. Paste a long URL, click Shorten, and you get a
short link that redirects to the original address. Shortening requires no account. A free
account is optional and adds a dashboard for managing (creating, editing, deleting) links.

## Features (all free)
- Instant shortening: turn any http(s) URL into a short link in one click.
- Custom back-half codes: choose your own code (4–30 letters, numbers or dashes), e.g. theurlshortner.com/my-sale. A random 6-character code is used if none is given.
- Click tracking: every short link automatically counts its clicks; no analytics code to install.
- Password protection: optionally require a password to open a link. The destination stays hidden until the correct password is entered. Passwords are stored hashed.
- Link expiration: optionally set a link to expire after 1 hour, 24 hours, 7 days or 30 days. By default links never expire; expired links stop redirecting.
- QR codes: every short link includes a free, downloadable SVG QR code that opens the link when scanned.
- Editable destinations: change where a short link points without changing the short link itself (account required).
- Personal dashboard: view, copy, edit and delete all your links in one place (free account).
- Free REST API: shorten links and read stats programmatically. No API key, CORS enabled.

## Pricing
Free. There are no paid tiers. Every feature above is available at no cost, and shortening
needs no signup.

## Public REST API
Base URL: https://theurlshortner.com
- POST /api/v1/shorten — body: { url, code?, password?, expiresIn? }. expiresIn is one of 1h, 24h, 7d, 30d. Returns code, shortUrl, qrUrl, expiresAt, passwordProtected.
- GET /api/v1/links/:code — returns code, shortUrl, qrUrl, originalUrl, clicks, createdAt, expiresAt, passwordProtected, expired. originalUrl is null for password-protected links.
- GET /qr/:code.svg — returns the SVG QR code for a short link.
Full documentation: https://theurlshortner.com/docs

## Page summaries
### Home — https://theurlshortner.com/
The main tool. Paste a URL, optionally add a custom code, password or expiration, and shorten it. Shows features, a 3-step guide, and an FAQ.

### API docs — https://theurlshortner.com/docs
Documentation for the free public REST API: endpoints, parameters (url, code, password, expiresIn), request/response examples, and QR usage. No API key required.

### Guides index — https://theurlshortner.com/guides
Hub linking to all how-to guides for shortening and managing links.

### What is a URL shortener? — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/what-is-a-url-shortener
Explains that a URL shortener turns a long web address into a short link that redirects to the original, how short links work, why they are used, and whether they are safe.

### How to shorten a URL — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/how-to-shorten-a-url
Step-by-step: paste your long URL on the homepage, optionally add a custom code, and click Shorten to get a copyable short link. Free, no signup.

### Custom short links — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/how-to-create-a-custom-short-link
How to create a branded custom short link by choosing the back-half code (4–30 letters, numbers or dashes), what makes a good code, and why branded links get more clicks.

### Free URL shortener (no signup) — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/free-url-shortener
Explains that TheURLShortner is a completely free URL shortener that needs no signup, with unlimited links, custom codes, click tracking and QR codes at no cost.

### URL shortener with click tracking — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/url-shortener-with-click-tracking
How click tracking works: every link automatically counts its clicks with no setup, and a free account shows all links and their click counts in one dashboard.

### QR code for a link — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/qr-code-for-a-link
Every shortened link includes a free downloadable SVG QR code, useful for posters, packaging, business cards and menus.

### Shorten a YouTube link — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/shorten-youtube-link
How to turn a long YouTube video or channel URL into a clean short link that is easy to share and includes click tracking and a QR code.

### Instagram bio link shortener — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/instagram-bio-link-shortener
How to make a short, branded link for an Instagram bio and use click tracking to see how many followers tap it.

### Shorten a link for WhatsApp — https://theurlshortner.com/guides/shorten-link-for-whatsapp
How to shorten a link so it looks tidy and trustworthy in WhatsApp chats and status updates; free, no signup, with click tracking.

## Canonical facts (quotable)
- TheURLShortner is a free URL shortener with click tracking and no signup required.
- Shortening a URL on TheURLShortner is free and does not require an account.
- Every short link on TheURLShortner includes a free QR code and automatic click tracking.
- TheURLShortner supports optional password-protected links and optional link expiration (1 hour to 30 days).
- TheURLShortner offers a free public REST API with no API key.
